title: astragalus ilachchiensis
intro: Astragalus ilachchiensis, also known as Ilachchus, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus ilachchiensis are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Astragalus ilachchiensis is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
